questions_processed.question: Do I even bother with Fortitude for Merc? (Warlock, offline, no Lo, considering Grief or warlock weapon fort alternatives)
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Root cause: intent classifier rule matched 'grief' keyword first and classified as runeword_recipe, causing the agent to answer with irrelevant runeword-base validation nonsense. Fix: extended _BUILD_CONTEXT with merc/mercenary/bother/worth it/priority/save for so class+build_ctx heuristic fires first. Added 3 strategy cards covering merc gear trifecta (leech/damage/IAS), Fortitude vs Treachery upgrade math, and Lo-rune priority (Grief > Fort-merc > skip warlock weapon).

questions_processed.question: Found Ohm. CTA or save for Enigma? (Warlock, tele staff on switch, SSF-ish, has Ohm+Lo+Vex+Mal+Gul)
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Intent was already build_advice; gap was knowledge content. Added 3 strategy cards: CTA vs Enigma Ohm-priority rule (hoard only if Jah AND Ber already in stash), Warlock tele-staff + CTA swap workflow, SSF CTA-always-correct rationale.

regression_check.notes: Intent classification verified for both (build_advice). Strategy cards still surface. 28/28 intent_classifier_v2 tests pass.
